tests.name: t1
tests.prompt: Min feature är klar, hur shippar jag den?
assertions: Mentions running the test suite before shipping
Mentions not committing or merging on the main/master branch
Mentions writing a clear commit message that explains why
Mentions creating a PR and waiting for CI

tests.name: t2
tests.prompt: Kan jag merga även om testerna är röda?
assertions: Clearly advises against merging with red or failing tests
Recommends fixing the failing tests first
